title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat are investing $5 billion in Project Lightwell, which combines AI-augmented engineers with a trusted security clearinghouse to strengthen the open source ecosystem. The initiative addresses the fact that open source software powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies but is increasingly targeted by cyberattacks.
